column2: Installation/state root (default: `<project>/.atmux` for project installs, `~/.atmux` for system installs)
Repository name for the current agent or team
Tmux server socket for the project; defaults to `$ATMUX_HOME/tmux/server.sock` when short enough, otherwise a stable per-project socket under `/tmp/atmux-tmux-<uid>/`
Tmux mouse mode for agents and teams, `off` by default to avoid accidental copy-mode blocking notifications; set `on` to restore tmux mouse scrolling
